mapper.insert: insert into course_embeddings ( course_id, source_version, source_hash, embedding_dimension, provider, model, status, attempt_count, updated_at ) values ( #{courseId}, 'v1', '', 1536, 'openai', 'unknown', 'PENDING', 0, current_timestamp ) on conflict (course_id) do update set status = case when course_embeddings.status = 'PROCESSING' then 'PROCESSING' else 'PENDING' end, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.select: with claimed as ( select ce.course_id from course_embeddings ce join courses c on c.id = ce.course_id and c.deleted_at is null where ce.status = 'PENDING' and ( select count(*) from course_items where course_id = ce.course_id ) >= 2 order by ce.updated_at asc limit #{limit} for update skip locked ) update course_embeddings set status = 'PROCESSING', updated_at = current_timestamp where course_id in (select course_id from claimed) returning course_id

select c.id as courseId, c.title as title, c.region_name as regionName, string_agg(distinct t.name, ', ') as tagNames, string_agg(coalesce(a.title, n.title), ', ') as stopTitles, ( select cat from ( select coalesce(a2.content_type_id, n2.category) as cat, count(*) as cnt from course_items ci2 left join attractions a2 on a2.id = ci2.attraction_id left join notes n2 on n2.id = ci2.note_id where ci2.course_id = c.id and coalesce(a2.content_type_id, n2.category) is not null group by cat order by cnt desc limit 1 ) sub ) as dominantCategory from courses c left join course_items ci on ci.course_id = c.id left join attractions a on a.id = ci.attraction_id left join notes n on n.id = ci.note_id left join course_tags ctag on ctag.course_id = c.id left join tags t on t.id = ctag.tag_id where c.id = #{courseId} group by c.id, c.title, c.region_name
mapper.insert: insert into course_embeddings ( course_id, description, embedding, dominant_category, source_version, source_hash, embedding_dimension, provider, model, status, failure_code, failure_message, attempt_count, last_attempted_at, embedded_at, updated_at ) values ( #{courseId}, #{description}, #{vectorLiteral}::vector, #{dominantCategory}, #{sourceVersion}, #{sourceHash}, #{dimension}, #{provider}, #{model}, 'EMBEDDED', null, null, 1, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (course_id) do update set description = coalesce(excluded.description, course_embeddings.description), embedding = coalesce(excluded.embedding::vector, course_embeddings.embedding), dominant_category = excluded.dominant_category, source_version = excluded.source_version, source_hash = excluded.source_hash, embedding_dimension = excluded.embedding_dimension, provider = excluded.provider, model = excluded.model, status = 'EMBEDDED', failure_code = null, failure_message = null, attempt_count = course_embeddings.attempt_count + 1, last_attempted_at = current_timestamp, embedded_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp

insert into course_embeddings ( course_id, source_version, source_hash, embedding_dimension, provider, model, status, failure_code, failure_message, attempt_count, last_attempted_at, updated_at ) values ( #{courseId}, #{sourceVersion}, #{sourceHash}, 1536, #{provider}, #{model}, 'FAILED', #{failureCode}, #{failureMessage}, 1, current_timestamp, current_timestamp ) on conflict (course_id) do update set source_version = excluded.source_version, source_hash = excluded.source_hash, embedding_dimension = 1536, provider = excluded.provider, model = excluded.model, status = 'FAILED', embedding = null, failure_code = excluded.failure_code, failure_message = excluded.failure_message, attempt_count = course_embeddings.attempt_count + 1, last_attempted_at = current_timestamp, embedded_at = null, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.select: select source_hash from course_embeddings where course_id = #{courseId} and status = 'EMBEDDED'
